title: onobrychis alba subsp. mairei
intro: Onobrychis alba subsp. mairei, also known as white spiny melilot, is a sub-species of the melilotus plant family, which is a perennial herb with a long history of medicinal use. The plant is rich in flavonoids and coumarins, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis alba subsp. mairei include the treatment of digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder in various applications.
